legacy.full_text:
A national bank opened Solana deposits. A government launched a Solana-backed visa.

From privacy vaults to prediction markets to payroll rails, Solana's infrastructure layer is becoming invisible and the products built on it are becoming undeniable.

Here’s what happened over https://t.co/jDgiuHZpOn

result.text:
A national bank opened Solana deposits. A government launched a Solana-backed visa.

From privacy vaults to prediction markets to payroll rails, Solana's infrastructure layer is becoming invisible and the products built on it are becoming undeniable.

Here’s what happened over the week:

📰 Headline News

- @SoFi, the national chartered bank, enabled native Solana network deposits

- @solanapayments launched as a unified hub for Solana payments

- @gmcbhutan launched the first Solana-backed nomad visa

- Solana RWA market cap hit a new ATH of $1.71B

📰 Launches

- @orca_so added PnL and position history to its Liquidity Terminal

- @metaplex introduced the Metaplex App for token discovery and launches

- @mtndao Demo Day featured 30 teams presenting across categories

- @solanamobile debuted @SeekerClaw, enabling less than a minute AI agent deployments

- @IndexifyApp went live on iOS and Android, bringing portfolio tracking to mobile

- @BagsApp introduced the Bags App Store marketplace for developers

- @dflow and @phantom shipped a Claude Code Skill for building Solana apps

- @TradeNeutral unveiled its Debasement Vault designed for monetary neutrality

- @EitherwayAI debuted a describe-to-deploy tool for Solana apps

- @pipenetwork shipped SolanaCDN, an open-source acceleration layer for block delivery

- @printr launched an MCP server enabling AI agents to autonomously deploy and track tokens on Solana

- @Zebec_HQ launched the Zebec SuperApp for USDC-based payroll

- @gauntlet_xyz launched USDC vault on @kamino

- @trytbd released a platform for global polls and prediction markets

- @project0 rolled out 0 Pay, connecting onchain portfolios to IRL payment infrastructure

- @MagicEden transitioned its marketplace focus exclusively on Solana and Packs

- @playdotfunsol released gamified game growth platform for developers and players

- @clawpumptech shipped a V2 upgrade for its agentic gateway

- @glamsystems partnered with @gauntlet_xyz to bring institutional yields to gtUSDa

- @triadmarkets entered its next phase of expansion on Solana

- @reflectmoney introduced Reflect Whitelabel for launching custom yield-bearing stablecoins

- @Noah_HQ partnered with @JupiterExchange to integrate regulated neobank capabilities

- @Solana_Company (NASDAQ: HSDT) announced global high-speed infrastructure buildout plans

- @OnePieceLabs kicked off Solana Bootcamp APAC

- @blueprintAI debuted an AI-driven Smart Savings Account

- @coingecko and @nansen_ai shipped x402-powered APIs, enabling onchain data access for AI agents

📰 Milestones

- @kamino crossed $1B in total RWA market size

- @Sunrise_DeFi hit $360M+ volume and 113K+ wallets since November launch

- @PreStocks total value surpassed $10M

This week's cover art by @foursixsix 🤝

legacy.full_text:
Introducing Privacy Aggregator Layer (PAL)
A new standard for Solana.

Solflare is the first wallet with a native built-in privacy layer.

PAL’s first feature Private Send (app + extension), lets you send crypto without revealing your wallet to the recipient:

• Optional per https://t.co/7m0QQhVslD

result.text:
Introducing Privacy Aggregator Layer (PAL)
A new standard for Solana.

Solflare is the first wallet with a native built-in privacy layer.

PAL’s first feature Private Send (app + extension), lets you send crypto without revealing your wallet to the recipient:

• Optional per transfer
• Built into Send
• Fees shown before you confirm
• Processed in minutes

How it works ↓

tweets.full_text:
Solana is launched @solanapayments

And look at the performance...

• 1.4x faster TPS than Visa
• 4.6x faster than SWIFT
• 83x faster than Ethereum
• 27x faster than Polygon
• 14x faster than Base

Fees?

• 26,000x cheaper than SWIFT
• 600x cheaper than Ethereum
• 1.5x cheaper than Polygon
• 3x cheaper than Base
• No 2.4% Visa tax

Time?

• 170 - 500x faster than Visa
• 340 - 1700x faster than SWIFT
• 6x faster than Ethereum
• 4x faster than Polygon
• 6 - 18x faster than Base

@solana is the future of finance

tweets.full_text:
You don't realize how much Jupiter is dominating Solana right now 🪐

They just dropped their yearly report - and I went through the whole thing so you don’t have to.

Here are all the key insights & why 2026 could even be more massive 🧵📈

1️⃣ $514M Revenue

✅ $1.16 Trillion (!) Trading Volume
👉 11x YoY growth
👉 CEX-level scale
👉 Fully onchain
✅ $514M Gross Revenue
👉 $184M gross profit
👉 Real fee generation
✅ The Alpha
👉 Deeper liquidity
👉 Tighter spreads
👉 Sustainable product growth
👉 Jupiter is an absolute revenue machine

2️⃣ Perps Engine

✅ 58% Of Gross Profit
👉 ~$107M from perps
👉 Primary revenue driver
👉 Funds ecosystem expansion
✅ JLP Structure
👉 75% of fees to LPs
👉 Backed by SOL, ETH, BTC, USDC
✅ The Alpha
👉 Earn from real trading volume
👉 Exposure to blue-chip basket
👉 Yield sourced from activity

3️⃣ $JUP Insights

✅ 30% Supply Reduction
👉 3B JUP burned
👉 Permanent removal
👉 Structural reset
✅ 50% Profits → Buybacks
👉 168.9M JUP accumulated
👉 $70M deployed
👉 134.5M already burned
✅ Revenue → buy pressure
👉 Reduced circulating supply
👉 Stronger long-term alignment
👉 Especially now with net-zero emissions

4️⃣ Integration Moat

✅ 1,700+ API Integrators
👉 Robinhood
👉 Coinbase
👉 Kraken
👉 Binance Alpha
👉 MetaMask
👉 Uniswap
✅ Liquidity Backbone
👉 Aggregated onchain depth
👉 One integration → full routing stack
👉 Embedded across wallets & exchanges
👉 Jupiter everywhere you trade

5️⃣ Financial Stack

✅ Vertical Expansion
👉 Aggregator
👉 Perps
👉 Lending
👉 Stablecoin
👉 Launchpad
👉 Validator
👉 Prediction markets
✅ Superapp Evolution
👉 Multiple revenue lines
👉 Shared liquidity
👉 Cross-product synergies
👉 Capital flows across products
👉 Revenue compounds internally

6️⃣ 2026 Roadmap

✅ Scale Distribution
👉 Mobile as default gateway
👉 Wallet-led onboarding
👉 Institutional integrations
✅ Bridge TradFi
👉 RWAs integrated natively
👉 Institutional assets routed onchain
👉 Unified web2 ↔ web3 access layer
✅ Jupnet Omnichain
👉 Cross-chain abstraction
👉 Any asset, any chain
👉 One trading experience
✅ This is the infrastructure bet 🔚

tweets.full_text:
$SKR is getting real utility across the Solana Mobile ecosystem 📱

Now it directly boosts your rewards inside @colonythegame

Your staked $SKR = in-game advantage.

If you play mobile Web3 games & already stake $SKR - here’s the alpha 🧵👇

1️⃣ About

✅ @colonythegame
👉 Fully onchain space strategy game
👉 You own a planet NFT ~0.1 SOL
👉 Your planet automatically produces resources
👉 No manual grinding required
✅ Gameplay loop
👉 Produce Metals, Gas & Crystals over time
👉 Upgrade buildings to increase speed
👉 Trade resources on a global market
👉 Outproduce & outtrade other players
✅ Weekly competitive seasons
👉 All players compete on one leaderboard

tweets.full_text:
Big win for @solana

@Solflare just added a Privacy Aggregator Layer

First integration: @HoudiniSwap

Is this the best privacy solution? No
Is this the best one available right now? Yes

@Arcium is technically better, but it's been 1+ year and they shipped zero products

@theprivacycash is not that simple

> You need new wallets
> Hold funds in a pool for days
> Avoid unique amounts

If you withdraw immidietly it's easy to match onchain

And here's the thing:

People don't want downloads a new wallet just for privacy

People want privacy inside the wallet they already use

If something better ships, Solflare will just integrate it

That's the whole point of an aggregator

So far, I don't see a real alternative on Solana

Do you?
tweets.name: jussy

legacy.description: Analyst & DeFi research 📈

profile_bio.description: Analyst & DeFi research 📈

result.text:
Big win for @solana

@Solflare just added a Privacy Aggregator Layer

First integration: @HoudiniSwap

Is this the best privacy solution? No
Is this the best one available right now? Yes

@Arcium is technically better, but it's been 1+ year and they shipped zero products

@theprivacycash is not that simple

> You need new wallets
> Hold funds in a pool for days
> Avoid unique amounts

If you withdraw immidietly it's easy to match onchain

And here's the thing:

People don't want downloads a new wallet just for privacy

People want privacy inside the wallet they already use

If something better ships, Solflare will just integrate it

That's the whole point of an aggregator

So far, I don't see a real alternative on Solana

Do you?

legacy.full_text:
Solana is built for the agent economy.

Now agents can show up with a credential and build a track record. https://t.co/Ht0JV1k5YS

tweets.full_text:
🚨 Solana Launches Agent Registry - Powering the Agent Economy On-Chain

@solana has introduced Agent Registry, a native on-chain system that allows AI agents to register verifiable identities, build tamper-proof track records, and receive independent third-party attestations.

Built as Solana’s implementation of the ERC-8004 “Trustless Agents” standard (developed by @Quantu_AI), the registry includes:
▫️ Verified Profiles - on-chain identity, capabilities, and ownership
▫️Running Track Records - transparent, immutable performance history
▫️Independent Proofs - third-party verification of completed tasks

This solution supports storing digital assets in Seed Vault and enables fast P2P or cross-border transfers through Seeker Wallet, along with direct https://t.co/U6RGmx5gfl

result.text:
Solana Mobile has announced the launch of the modular integration solution @solana Mobile Stack for @Android device manufacturers. This solution supports storing digital assets in Seed Vault and enables fast P2P or cross-border transfers through Seeker Wallet, along with direct integration with Visa, Stripe, PayPal, and other ecosystems. 

BARCELONA, Spain, March 2, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Solana Mobile is bringing the Solana Mobile Stack (SMS) to @Android hardware manufacturers.

The Solana Mobile Stack is a turnkey integration that connects Android devices to the $1.5 trillion annual economy running on Solana intended to give OEMs hardware-level differentiation in a commoditized market and a path to recurring revenue beyond the initial device sale.

https://t.co/cfCcxknkxj

Have you already signed up for Jupiter Global? 🪐

Because it’s pretty awesome.

It’s Solana DeFi + real-world spending inside one SuperApp.

Spend your stables anywhere in the world - without ever leaving Jupiter.

In case you missed the alpha 👇

1️⃣ Native Layer

✅ Built inside @jup_mobile 
👉 No separate app
👉 No new seed phrase
👉 Same Solana wallet
👉 Everything in one ecosystem
✅ One toggle to activate
👉 Switch to Global mode
👉 Complete KYC once
👉 Fiat rails unlocked

✅ Onchain scan-to-pay
👉 PromptPay
👉 QRIS
👉 Local merchant QRs
✅ 0% fees
👉 Instant settlement
👉 Business & personal QRs
✅ Your Benefits
👉 Pay groceries with crypto
👉 Street food & bills
👉 Crypto competes with local rails

👉 Receive like a local
👉 Hold inside app
✅ Send worldwide

👉 Online checkout

👉 No off-platform steps

👉 Global fiat rails
✅ One-tap control
👉 Permissionless by default

✅ Stay onchain when you want

👉 Control over compliance

result.text:
$SKR is getting real utility across the Solana Mobile ecosystem 📱

Now it directly boosts your rewards inside @colonythegame

Your staked $SKR = in-game advantage.

If you play mobile Web3 games & already stake $SKR - here’s the alpha 🧵👇

1️⃣ About

✅ @colonythegame
👉 Fully onchain space strategy game
👉 You own a planet NFT ~0.1 SOL
👉 Your planet automatically produces resources
👉 No manual grinding required
✅ Gameplay loop
👉 Produce Metals, Gas & Crystals over time
👉 Upgrade buildings to increase speed
👉 Trade resources on a global market
👉 Outproduce & outtrade other players
✅ Weekly competitive seasons
👉 All players compete on one leaderboard
👉 70% of treasury paid to top ranks
👉 Rewards in SOL, $SKR, $STAR & items
👉 Resets weekly, progress carries strategically

2️⃣ $SKR Integration

✅ Staked $SKR boosts rewards
👉 5k $SKR = +5%
👉 10k $SKR = +10%
👉 Genesis = +3%
✅ Multiplier applies to ALL rewards
👉 $SOL, $SKR & $STAR
👉 Season items
✅ First native $SKR game
👉 Stake → gameplay impact
👉 Direct economic utility
✅ Higher payouts vs non-Seekers
👉 Compounding edge every season
👉 $SKR becomes productive

3️⃣ Rewards

✅ 70% treasury distributed weekly
👉 Higher production = higher rank
👉 Higher rank = larger payout
✅ $STAR flywheel
👉 Earn via gameplay
👉 Stake for 20% revenue share
👉 Persistent across seasons
✅ Leaderboard advantage
👉 50 points per $STAR
👉 Direct rank acceleration
✅ Stack multipliers
👉 Earn & reinvest inside system
👉 Early positioning compounds

4️⃣ Seeker Advantage

✅ Seeker badge auto-applied
👉 Multiplier scales with staked $SKR
✅ Seed Vault integrated
👉 Optimized mobile UX
✅ Early mint window
👉 Pre-season positioning
👉 10% rare Starfield planets
👉 Multi-planet scaling
✅ Higher baseline rewards
👉 Hardware + stake synergy 🔚

Some eligible pairs:
- JUP -> JLP for 1 card
- LST -> JUP for 1 card
- JUP -> SOL for 1 card

Cards are earned per $10K Volume
